description: island sovereign state in the Caribbean Sea
description_wiki: Dominican Republic is a country on the Caribbean island of Hispaniola in the Greater Antilles of the Caribbean Sea in the North Atlantic Ocean.

description: land warfare branch of the Dominican Republic's military
description_wiki: The Dominican Army (Spanish: Ejército de República Dominicana), is one of the three branches of the Armed Forces of the Dominican Republic, together with the Navy and the Air Force.

description: maritime branch of the United States military
description_wiki: The United States Navy (USN) is the maritime service branch of the United States Armed Forces and is designated as the navy of the United States in the Constitution.

aliases: Theme Park Capital of the World
description: city in and county seat of Orange County, Florida, United States
description_wiki: Orlando (  or-LAN-doh) is a city in and the county seat of Orange County, Florida, United States.

surface_forms: air cruise school in Pensacola, Florida
description_wiki: Naval Air Station Pensacola or NAS Pensacola (IATA: NPA, ICAO: KNPA, FAA LID: NPA) is a United States Navy base located next to Warrington, Florida, a community southwest of the Pensacola city limits.

description: city in and county seat of Shelby County, Tennessee, United States
description_wiki: Memphis (, MEM-fis) is a city in Shelby County, Tennessee, United States, and its county seat.

description: city in Shelby County, Tennessee, United States of America
description_wiki: Millington is a city in Shelby County, Tennessee, United States, and is a part of the Memphis metropolitan area.

description: city in Duval County, and largest city in State of Florida, United States
description_wiki: Jacksonville (US:  , JAK-sən-vil; colloquially nicknamed Jax) is the most populous city proper in the U.S. state of Florida, located on the Atlantic coast of northeastern Florida.

description: island in the Mediterranean, region of Italy
description_wiki: Sicily (Italian and Sicilian: Sicilia), officially the Sicilian Region, is an island in the central Mediterranean Sea and one of the twenty regions of Italy, situated south of the Italian Peninsula in continental Europe.

description: town in Cumberland County, Maine, United States
description_wiki: Brunswick is a town in Cumberland County, Maine, United States.
The Lockheed P-3 Orion is a four-engined, turboprop anti-submarine and maritime surveillance aircraft developed for the United States Navy and introduced in the 1960s.

description: 1947–1991 tension between the Soviet Union and the United States and their respective allies
description_wiki: The Cold War was a period of international geopolitical rivalry between the United States (US) and the Soviet Union (USSR) and their respective allies, the capitalist Western Bloc and communist Eastern Bloc.
